creator: nick@kirby.cx
text:
This actually is a bit trickier than I thought.

The distfile for babel from PyPI changed from a capital B in 2.14.0 to a lowercase B in 2.15.0

This means all 35 ports depending on it will need a quick bump to fix the casing in the Makefile. Unless there's another way I am unaware of.

Thoughts?
